beats.action: The Scarred Gorge is choked with red dust, energy blasts shear through stone ridges, shattering defensive lines.
beats.camera: wide shot, slow pan across the chaotic gorge

beats.action: Lyra stands near a collapsed trench, her sword gleaming, trying to rally panicked survivors.
beats.camera: medium close-up, slight upward tilt

dialogue.text: Hold the line! Fall back to the secondary ridge in formation! Do not let them scatter you!

beats.action: Retreating cultivators ignore Lyra, fleeing past her in a chaotic rout as another barrage of explosive qi rains down.
beats.camera: over-the-shoulder of Lyra, showing the fleeing cultivators

beats.action: Master Valerius drives his heavy blade into the trembling earth, anchoring himself, his breath heavy.
beats.camera: medium close-up, focusing on his heavy breathing and grip

dialogue.text: It is a tide, child. You cannot command a broken dam to hold back the sea.

beats.action: Valerius looks out at the chaos, his formidable frame bearing the physical toll.
beats.camera: medium shot, showing his full form against the chaotic backdrop

dialogue.text: Our techniques are too slow for this chaos.

beats.action: Kaelen stands on a rocky outcrop just above them, his eyes darting across the gorge, analyzing the enemy's advance.
beats.camera: medium close-up on Kaelen, slight high angle

dialogue.text: They are overextending their vanguard to secure a quick slaughter. They expect us to cluster on the ridge.

beats.action: Kaelen continues to observe the battlefield, unblinking.
beats.camera: close-up on Kaelen's eyes, darting

dialogue.text: It is a predictable tactical error.

beats.action: Lyra turns to Kaelen, furious, pointing her blade at him.
beats.camera: medium two-shot, Lyra foreground, Kaelen slightly background

dialogue.text: A tactical error? They are butchering us! We have to stand and protect the wounded!

beats.action: Kaelen steps down from the ledge, completely ignoring Lyra's anger.
beats.camera: medium shot, Kaelen stepping down, Lyra slightly out of focus in foreground

beats.action: Kaelen looks directly at Lyra, his face chillingly calm.
beats.camera: close-up on Kaelen's face

dialogue.text: The wounded are already dead; they simply haven't stopped moving.

beats.action: Kaelen gestures towards the eastern archway with a slight head nod.
beats.camera: medium shot of Kaelen, framing the gesture

dialogue.text: If we collapse the eastern archway now, we bury the vanguard—along with the thirty traditionalists bottlenecked beneath it.

beats.action: Lyra steps back, horrified, her eyes wide.
beats.camera: close-up on Lyra's face, a slight push in

dialogue.text: You would crush our own people? To buy yourself a minute? You are a monster, Kaelen!

beats.action: Kaelen holds her gaze, his expression flat and analytical, unaffected by her accusation.
beats.camera: medium close-up on Kaelen

dialogue.text: To buy us the gorge. The collapse funnels the remaining sect forces into the creek bed where your archers actually have a line of sight.

beats.action: Kaelen finishes his explanation, his tone unwavering.
beats.camera: close-up on Kaelen's mouth and chin

dialogue.text: It yields a sixty percent survival rate for active combatants. Your way yields zero.

beats.action: Lyra turns sharply to Valerius, searching for a reprimand, but he looks down at his blood-stained hands.
beats.camera: medium two-shot, Lyra's pleading face, Valerius's downcast gaze

beats.action: Valerius slowly looks up, his eyes clouded with sorrow, towards the crumbling ridge.
beats.camera: close-up on Valerius's face, slow zoom out to show the ridge in background

dialogue.text: He is correct, Lyra. The traditional formations are dust. If we do not cut the limb, the poison takes the heart.

beats.action: Kaelen steps closer to Valerius, his voice urgent and commanding.
beats.camera: medium two-shot, Kaelen's intensity, Valerius's heavy stance

dialogue.text: Master Valerius, your qi is the only force strong enough to trigger the collapse from here.

beats.action: Kaelen gestures emphatically towards the archway.
beats.camera: close-up on Kaelen's hand gesturing

dialogue.text: Do it now, or the choice is made for us.

beats.action: Valerius raises his hand, his eyes clouded with the familiar weight of sacrifice, and unleashes a concentrated wave of energy.
beats.camera: medium close-up, focusing on Valerius's hand and face, energy emanating

beats.action: The archway buckles and collapses, bringing down tons of rock. Screams are cut short, replaced by a massive cloud of dust.
beats.camera: wide shot of the archway collapsing, dust cloud expanding rapidly

beats.action: Lyra watches the collapse, her knuckles white around her hilt. She looks at Kaelen.
beats.camera: medium two-shot, Lyra's intense gaze on Kaelen

dialogue.text: I will never forgive you for this.

beats.action: Lyra, trembling with anger, raises her sword to signal the surviving archers toward the creek bed.
beats.camera: medium shot, Lyra raising her sword, Kaelen visible in the background

beats.action: Kaelen is indifferent to Lyra's words, already looking toward the next ridge, planning.
beats.camera: close-up on Kaelen, his eyes scanning the horizon

dialogue.text: I did not ask for your forgiveness. Move your archers.
